//
// USER
//

model User {
  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
  username  String     @unique
  email     String?    @unique
  password  String
  fullName  String?
  status    UserStatus @default(ACTIVE)

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  refreshTokens RefreshToken[]
  userRoles     UserRole[]

  @@map("users")
}

model RefreshToken {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  tokenHash String
  expiresAt DateTime
  revokedAt DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([expiresAt])
  @@map("refresh_tokens")
}

model Role {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  userRoles       UserRole[]
  rolePermissions RolePermission[]

  @@map("roles")
}

model Permission {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  rolePermissions RolePermission[]

  @@map("permissions")
}

model UserRole {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  roleId    String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  role Role @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([userId, roleId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@map("user_roles")
}

model RolePermission {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  roleId       String
  permissionId String
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt

  role       Role       @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  permission Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([permissionId])
  @@map("role_permissions")
}

//
// INVENTORY
//

model InventoryCategory {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  code        String   @unique
  description String?

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  items InventoryItem[]

  @@map("inventory_categories")
}

model InventoryItem {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  code String @unique

  name String

  description String?

  quantity Float @default(0)

  minimumStock Float @default(0)

  unit String?

  categoryId String

  zoneId String?

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  category InventoryCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])

  zone WarehouseZone? @relation(fields: [zoneId], references: [id])

  transactionItems InventoryTransactionItem[]

  @@index([code])
  @@index([name])

  @@map("inventory_items")
}

model InventoryTransaction {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  code String @unique

  type TransactionType

  note String?

  performedBy String?

  referenceModule String?

//
// ANALYTICS
//

model AnalyticsSnapshot {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  domain       AnalyticsDomain @default(ERP)
  snapshotType String          @default("operational")
  periodStart  DateTime?
  periodEnd    DateTime?
  metrics      Json?
  trends       Json?
  bottlenecks  Json?
  slaViolations Json?
  anomalies    Json?
  generatedByJobId String?

  totalProjects Int @default(0)

  totalComponents Int @default(0)

  completedProjects Int @default(0)

  delayedProjects Int @default(0)

  inventoryValue Float @default(0)

  purchaseTotal Float @default(0)

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  metricRecords AnalyticsMetric[]
  aggregations   AnalyticsAggregation[]
  alerts         AnalyticsAlert[]
  predictions    AnalyticsPrediction[]

  @@index([domain])
  @@index([snapshotType])
  @@index([periodStart, periodEnd])
  @@map("analytics_snapshots")
}

model AnalyticsMetric {
  id         String              @id @default(cuid())
  snapshotId String?
  domain     AnalyticsDomain
  key        String
  label      String
  type       AnalyticsMetricType @default(KPI)
  value      Float
  unit       String?
  target     Float?
  threshold  Float?
  trend      Float?
  metadata   Json?
  recordedAt DateTime            @default(now())
  createdAt  DateTime            @default(now())

  snapshot AnalyticsSnapshot? @relation(fields: [snapshotId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([snapshotId])
  @@index([domain, key])
  @@index([recordedAt])
  @@map("analytics_metrics")
}

model AnalyticsAggregation {
  id         String          @id @default(cuid())
  snapshotId String?
  domain     AnalyticsDomain
  key        String
  interval   String          @default("realtime")
  value      Json
  periodStart DateTime?
  periodEnd   DateTime?
  metadata   Json?
  createdAt  DateTime        @default(now())

  snapshot AnalyticsSnapshot? @relation(fields: [snapshotId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([snapshotId])
  @@index([domain, key])
  @@index([periodStart, periodEnd])
  @@map("analytics_aggregations")
}

model AnalyticsAlert {
  id          String                 @id @default(cuid())
  snapshotId  String?
  domain      AnalyticsDomain
  key         String
  title       String
  message     String
  severity    AnalyticsAlertSeverity @default(WARNING)
  status      AnalyticsAlertStatus   @default(OPEN)
  threshold   Float?
  actualValue Float?
  metadata    Json?
  acknowledgedAt DateTime?
  resolvedAt     DateTime?
  createdAt   DateTime               @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime               @updatedAt

  snapshot AnalyticsSnapshot? @relation(fields: [snapshotId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([snapshotId])
  @@index([domain])
  @@index([severity])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("analytics_alerts")
}

model AnalyticsPrediction {
  id          String                    @id @default(cuid())
  snapshotId  String?
  domain      AnalyticsDomain
  key         String
  title       String
  prediction  Json
  confidence  Float?
  horizon     String?
  status      AnalyticsPredictionStatus @default(DRAFT)
  modelName   String?
  metadata    Json?
  createdAt   DateTime                  @default(now())
  expiresAt   DateTime?

  snapshot AnalyticsSnapshot? @relation(fields: [snapshotId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([snapshotId])
  @@index([domain, key])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("analytics_predictions")
}

//
// WORKFLOW
//

model WorkflowDefinition {
  id          String                   @id @default(cuid())
  key         String                   @unique
  name        String
  description String?
  module      String?
  status      WorkflowDefinitionStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  version     Int                      @default(1)
  metadata    Json?
  createdAt   DateTime                 @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime                 @updatedAt

  steps     WorkflowStep[]
  instances WorkflowInstance[]

  @@index([module])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("workflow_definitions")
}

model WorkflowStep {
  id           String           @id @default(cuid())
  definitionId String
  key          String
  name         String
  description  String?
  type         WorkflowStepType @default(APPROVAL)
  order        Int
  approverRole String?
  approverUserId String?
  requiredPermission String?
  slaHours     Int?
  escalationRole String?
  escalationAfterHours Int?
  metadata     Json?
  createdAt    DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime         @updatedAt

  definition WorkflowDefinition @relation(fields: [definitionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  instances  WorkflowInstance[] @relation("CurrentWorkflowStep")
  actions    WorkflowAction[]

  @@unique([definitionId, key])
  @@unique([definitionId, order])
  @@index([definitionId])
  @@map("workflow_steps")
}

model WorkflowInstance {
  id             String                 @id @default(cuid())
  definitionId   String
  currentStepId  String?
  referenceModule String
  referenceId     String
  status         WorkflowInstanceStatus @default(PENDING)
  startedById    String?
  completedAt    DateTime?
  dueAt          DateTime?
  escalatedAt    DateTime?
  metadata       Json?
  createdAt      DateTime               @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime               @updatedAt

  definition  WorkflowDefinition @relation(fields: [definitionId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  currentStep WorkflowStep?      @relation("CurrentWorkflowStep", fields: [currentStepId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  actions     WorkflowAction[]

  @@index([definitionId])
  @@index([currentStepId])
  @@index([referenceModule, referenceId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([dueAt])
  @@map("workflow_instances")
}

model WorkflowAction {
  id         String             @id @default(cuid())
  instanceId String
  stepId     String?
  type       WorkflowActionType
  actorId    String?
  comment    String?
  fromStatus String?
  toStatus   String?
  metadata   Json?
  createdAt  DateTime           @default(now())

  instance WorkflowInstance @relation(fields: [instanceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  step     WorkflowStep?    @relation(fields: [stepId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([instanceId])
  @@index([stepId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("workflow_actions")
}

model AttachmentVersion {

model AttachmentLink {

// OUTBOX + BACKGROUND JOBS
//

model OutboxEvent {
  id             String            @id @default(cuid())
  eventName      String
  payload        Json
  metadata       Json?
  status         OutboxEventStatus @default(PENDING)
  idempotencyKey String?
  retryCount     Int               @default(0)
  maxRetries     Int               @default(5)
  nextAttemptAt  DateTime          @default(now())
  dispatchedAt   DateTime?
  lockedAt       DateTime?
  lockedBy       String?
  lastError      String?
  deadLetteredAt DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime          @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime          @updatedAt

  @@unique([idempotencyKey])
  @@index([status, nextAttemptAt])
  @@index([eventName])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("outbox_events")
}

model BackgroundJob {
  id             String              @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  queue          String              @default("default")
  payload        Json
  status         BackgroundJobStatus @default(QUEUED)
  idempotencyKey String?
  priority       Int                 @default(0)
  runAt          DateTime            @default(now())
  retryCount     Int                 @default(0)
  maxRetries     Int                 @default(5)
  lockedAt       DateTime?
  lockedBy       String?
  heartbeatAt    DateTime?
  completedAt    DateTime?
  failedAt       DateTime?
  deadLetteredAt DateTime?
  lastError      String?
  createdAt      DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime            @updatedAt

  executions JobExecution[]

  @@unique([idempotencyKey])
  @@index([queue, status, runAt])
  @@index([name])
  @@index([heartbeatAt])
  @@map("background_jobs")
}

model JobExecution {

  workerId    String?
  startedAt   DateTime           @default(now())
  completedAt DateTime?
  durationMs  Int?
  error       String?
  metadata    Json?

  job BackgroundJob @relation(fields: [jobId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([jobId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([startedAt])
  @@map("job_executions")
}

  updatedAt    DateTime      @updatedAt

  workCenter WorkCenter? @relation(fields: [workCenterId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  stages     ProductionStage[]

  plannedEndAt    DateTime?

  completedAt     DateTime?
  delayedAt       DateTime?

  createdAt       DateTime              @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime              @updatedAt

model ProductionStage {

  workCenter      WorkCenter?     @relation(fields: [workCenterId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  tasks           ProductionTask[]
  logs            ProductionLog[]

  @@unique([productionOrderId, sequence])

  @@index([workCenterId])
  @@index([machineId])

model ProductionTask {

  status            ProductionTaskStatus @default(TODO)
  priority          TaskPriority         @default(MEDIUM)

  assignedWorkerId  String?
  plannedStartAt    DateTime?
  plannedEndAt      DateTime?
  startedAt         DateTime?
  completedAt       DateTime?
  metadata          Json?
  createdAt         DateTime             @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime             @updatedAt

  productionOrder ProductionOrder @relation(fields: [productionOrderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  stage           ProductionStage? @relation(fields: [stageId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  workCenter      WorkCenter?      @relation(fields: [workCenterId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([productionOrderId])
  @@index([stageId])
  @@index([assignedWorkerId])

model ProductionSchedule {

  endAt             DateTime

  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt

  productionOrder ProductionOrder @relation(fields: [productionOrderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([machineId])

model ProductionLog {

  @@index([stageId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([createdAt])

//
// QUALITY CONTROL
//

model QcChecklist {
  id          String          @id @default(cuid())
  code        String          @unique
  name        String
  type        QcChecklistType @default(FINAL)
  revision    String          @default("A")
  description String?
  isActive    Boolean         @default(true)
  metadata    Json?
  createdAt   DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime        @updatedAt

  items       QcChecklistItem[]
  inspections QcInspection[]

  @@index([type])
  @@index([isActive])
  @@map("qc_checklists")
}

model QcChecklistItem {
  id            String   @id @default(cuid())
  checklistId   String
  sequence      Int
  title         String
  description   String?
  required      Boolean  @default(true)
  expectedValue String?
  tolerance     String?
  unit          String?
  metadata      Json?
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt

  checklist QcChecklist @relation(fields: [checklistId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  results   QcResult[]

  @@unique([checklistId, sequence])
  @@index([checklistId])
  @@map("qc_checklist_items")
}

model QcInspection {
  id                 String             @id @default(cuid())
  inspectionNo       String             @unique
  checklistId        String?
  productionOrderId  String?
  productionStageId  String?
  componentId        String?
  projectId          String?
  status             QcInspectionStatus @default(DRAFT)
  inspectorId        String?
  startedAt          DateTime?
  completedAt        DateTime?
  approvedById       String?
  approvedAt         DateTime?
  rejectedById       String?
  rejectedAt         DateTime?
  rejectionReason    String?
  workflowInstanceId String?
  metadata           Json?
  createdAt          DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime           @updatedAt

  checklist   QcChecklist?            @relation(fields: [checklistId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  results     QcResult[]
  issues      QcIssue[]
  attachments QcAttachment[]
  ncrs        NonConformanceReport[]

  @@index([status])
  @@index([productionOrderId])
  @@index([productionStageId])
  @@index([componentId])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([checklistId])
  @@map("qc_inspections")
}

model QcResult {
  id              String         @id @default(cuid())
  inspectionId    String
  checklistItemId String?
  category        QcChecklistType @default(FINAL)
  status          QcResultStatus @default(PENDING)
  measuredValue   String?
  expectedValue   String?
  tolerance       String?
  unit            String?
  notes           String?
  metadata        Json?
  createdAt       DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime       @updatedAt

  inspection    QcInspection     @relation(fields: [inspectionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  checklistItem QcChecklistItem? @relation(fields: [checklistItemId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  issues        QcIssue[]

  @@index([inspectionId])
  @@index([checklistItemId])
  @@index([category])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("qc_results")
}

model QcIssue {
  id               String          @id @default(cuid())
  inspectionId     String
  resultId         String?
  code             String?
  title            String
  description      String?
  severity         QcIssueSeverity @default(MEDIUM)
  status           QcIssueStatus   @default(OPEN)
  correctiveAction String?
  assignedToId     String?
  createdById      String?
  dueAt            DateTime?
  resolvedAt       DateTime?
  verifiedAt       DateTime?
  metadata         Json?
  createdAt        DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime        @updatedAt

  inspection  QcInspection           @relation(fields: [inspectionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  result      QcResult?              @relation(fields: [resultId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  attachments QcAttachment[]
  ncrs        NonConformanceReport[]

  @@index([inspectionId])
  @@index([resultId])
  @@index([severity])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("qc_issues")
}

model QcAttachment {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  inspectionId String?
  issueId      String?
  ncrId        String?
  attachmentId String
  purpose      String   @default("")
  metadata     Json?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  inspection QcInspection?         @relation(fields: [inspectionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  issue      QcIssue?              @relation(fields: [issueId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  ncr        NonConformanceReport? @relation(fields: [ncrId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  attachment Attachment            @relation(fields: [attachmentId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([inspectionId])
  @@index([issueId])
  @@index([ncrId])
  @@index([attachmentId])
  @@map("qc_attachments")
}

model NonConformanceReport {
  id                String          @id @default(cuid())
  ncrNo             String          @unique
  inspectionId      String
  issueId           String?
  productionOrderId String?
  componentId       String?
  status            NcrStatus       @default(OPEN)
  severity          QcIssueSeverity @default(HIGH)
  title             String
  description       String?
  rootCause         String?
  correctiveAction  String?
  disposition       String?
  raisedById        String?
  approvedById      String?
  closedAt          DateTime?
  metadata          Json?
  createdAt         DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime        @updatedAt

  inspection  QcInspection   @relation(fields: [inspectionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  issue       QcIssue?       @relation(fields: [issueId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  attachments QcAttachment[]

  @@index([inspectionId])
  @@index([issueId])
  @@index([productionOrderId])
  @@index([componentId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([severity])
  @@map("non_conformance_reports")
}

//
// YARD
//

model YardZone {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  code        String         @unique
  name        String
  description String?
  status      YardZoneStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  originX     Float          @default(0)
  originY     Float          @default(0)
  width       Float          @default(0)
  height      Float          @default(0)
  color       String         @default("#06b6d4")
  metadata    Json?
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt

  rows      YardRow[]
  slots     YardSlot[]
  snapshots YardSnapshot[]

  @@index([status])
  @@map("yard_zones")
}

model YardRow {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  zoneId    String
  code      String
  name      String?
  index     Int
  originX   Float    @default(0)
  originY   Float    @default(0)
  metadata  Json?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  zone  YardZone   @relation(fields: [zoneId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  slots YardSlot[]

  @@unique([zoneId, code])
  @@unique([zoneId, index])
  @@index([zoneId])
  @@map("yard_rows")
}

model YardSlot {
  id             String         @id @default(cuid())
  zoneId         String
  rowId          String?
  code           String
  status         YardSlotStatus @default(AVAILABLE)
  x              Float
  y              Float
  width          Float          @default(1)
  height         Float          @default(1)
  maxStackLevel  Int            @default(1)
  currentStackLevel Int         @default(0)
  metadata       Json?
  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt

  zone       YardZone             @relation(fields: [zoneId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  row        YardRow?             @relation(fields: [rowId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  placements YardItemPlacement[]
  fromMoves  YardMovement[]       @relation("YardMovementFromSlot")
  toMoves    YardMovement[]       @relation("YardMovementToSlot")

  @@unique([zoneId, code])
  @@index([zoneId])
  @@index([rowId])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("yard_slots")
}

model YardItemPlacement {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  slotId         String
  itemType       YardItemType
  itemId         String
  itemCode       String
  itemName       String?
  quantity       Float        @default(1)
  stackLevel     Int          @default(1)
  weight         Float?
  length         Float?
  width          Float?
  height         Float?
  placedById     String?
  placedAt       DateTime     @default(now())
  removedAt      DateTime?
  metadata       Json?
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt

  slot      YardSlot       @relation(fields: [slotId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  movements YardMovement[]

  @@index([slotId])
  @@index([itemType, itemId])
  @@index([itemCode])
  @@index([removedAt])
  @@map("yard_item_placements")
}

model YardMovement {
  id            String           @id @default(cuid())
  placementId   String?
  type          YardMovementType
  itemType      YardItemType
  itemId        String
  itemCode      String
  fromSlotId    String?
  toSlotId      String?
  craneId       String?
  movedById     String?
  reason        String?
  metadata      Json?
  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now())

  placement YardItemPlacement? @relation(fields: [placementId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  fromSlot  YardSlot?          @relation("YardMovementFromSlot", fields: [fromSlotId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  toSlot    YardSlot?          @relation("YardMovementToSlot", fields: [toSlotId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  crane     Crane?             @relation(fields: [craneId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([itemType, itemId])
  @@index([fromSlotId])
  @@index([toSlotId])
  @@index([craneId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("yard_movements")
}

model Crane {
  id          String      @id @default(cuid())
  code        String      @unique
  name        String
  status      CraneStatus @default(AVAILABLE)
  currentX    Float       @default(0)
  currentY    Float       @default(0)
  utilization Float       @default(0)
  metadata    Json?
  createdAt   DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime    @updatedAt

  movements YardMovement[]

  @@index([status])
  @@map("cranes")
}

model YardSnapshot {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  zoneId       String?
  name         String
  occupancyRate Float   @default(0)
  totalSlots   Int      @default(0)
  occupiedSlots Int     @default(0)
  heatmap      Json?
  congestion   Json?
  payload      Json
  generatedById String?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  zone YardZone? @relation(fields: [zoneId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([zoneId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("yard_snapshots")
}
